name: Acume Chemicals Private Limited
strategic_link_to_core_bromine_business: Direct forward integration of captive bromine into higher-value downstream products.
expected_scale_up: Running at 30% to 40% now; management is targeting 50% to 60% in coming quarters.

name: Idealis Chemicals Private Limited
status: Merger approved into Idealis Mudchemie / pending implementation
strategic_link_to_core_bromine_business: Hosts the Oren / Mudchemie acquisition that complements oilfield chemistry.
expected_scale_up: Board approved the merger of Idealis Chemicals into Idealis Mudchemie on March 19, 2026 to simplify the group structure and consolidate chemical and mud-chemical operations. The entity still exists separately until legal completion.

name: Neun Infra Private Limited
business: Holding company for SiCSem and semiconductor funding
status: Funding support in place / project holding structure
strategic_link_to_core_bromine_business: Not a direct bromine earnings arm; it houses the semiconductor platform and related funding.
expected_scale_up: Archean granted an additional Rs 6 cr loan on June 26, 2025, taking total Neun loans outstanding to Rs 73 cr to support the semiconductor business and silicon carbide research at IIT Bhubaneswar.

name: Idealis Mudchemie Private Limited
business: Customized drilling fluids and mud chemicals
status: Initial commercial operations / merger approved pending implementation
strategic_link_to_core_bromine_business: Broadens oilfield solutions alongside Acume clear brine fluids.
expected_scale_up: Commercial operations have started at an initial scale and customer samples and certifications are ongoing. Archean also approved the merger of Idealis Chemicals into Idealis Mudchemie on March 19, 2026, with legal completion still pending.

name: SiCSem Private Limited
strategic_link_to_core_bromine_business: Strategic adjacency rather than direct bromine monetization.
expected_scale_up: ISM approval is in hand, the fiscal support agreement is being finalized, and site work has already started.

name: Clas-SiC Wafer Fab Limited
business: SiC device technology and process modules
strategic_link_to_core_bromine_business: Supports the broader semiconductor platform rather than current bromine earnings.
expected_scale_up: Investment is complete and secures technology access in India for the wider SiCSem build-out.

name: Offgrid Energy Labs
strategic_link_to_core_bromine_business: Direct chemistry adjacency through zinc-bromide batteries.
expected_scale_up: 18.14% stake is already secured, the investment is expected to complete in FY26, and the next step is a 10 MWh demo line in the U.K.
